explanation: This command simulates a PowerShell invocation that loads an assembly using LoadAssemblyFromPath from the CL_LoadAssembly.ps1 script. It uses standard PowerShell syntax and is a direct match for the Sigma rule.

This command simulates a PowerShell invocation that loads an assembly using LoadAssemblyFromNS from the CL_LoadAssembly.ps1 script. It uses standard PowerShell syntax and is a direct match for the Sigma rule.
This command adds the -WindowStyle Hidden flag to obscure the PowerShell window, which is a common evasion technique. It still includes the LoadAssemblyFromPath call, matching the Sigma rule.
This command includes the -ExecutionPolicy Bypass flag, which is often used to bypass PowerShell execution restrictions. It still includes the LoadAssemblyFromNS call, matching the Sigma rule.
This command uses the -NonInteractive flag to prevent user interaction, which is a common technique in automated attacks. It still includes the LoadAssemblyFromPath call, matching the Sigma rule.
